name: YT
description: '''Oluwatola Joseph Fola-Alade''' (born May 5, 2001), known professionally as '''YT''', is an English rapper and songwriter from [[Romford]], [[East London]]. He first gained popularity in 2021 with his viral single "Arc'teryx", and is considered a pioneer of the [[Jerk (music genre)|jerk]] and [[UK underground rap]] scenes.
